package rulecoverage

func PositiveNPlusOneQuery() string {
    ruleID := "n_plus_one_query"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Database-style query calls issued inside loops. The semantic pack can raise severity when nested loops also appear."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
